title: dortmanna rupestris
intro: Dortmanna rupestris, also known as the Dortmann's rock rose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory tract infections, thanks to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna rupestris include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its numerous health benefits and medicinal properties.
